samples.xml_description:
Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. Input signal indicating the validity of the input data. 8-bit input data. Output signal indicating the validity of the output data. 16-bit output data. Flag signal for the width conversion process. Lock register for the first valid input data. Flag register for the width conversion process.

On reset, the data_lock register is cleared to 0.

When valid_in is 1, the input data in data_in is stored in the data_lock register.

When valid_in is 1 and flag is 1, the data_lock register is concatenated with data_in to generate data_out.

When valid_in is 1 and flag is 0, the input data in data_in is stored in the data_lock register.

When valid_in is 1 and flag is 1, valid_out is set to 1.

When valid_in is 0, valid_out is set to 0.
